creator: kaltheat@googlemail.com
text:
I'm unable to read and write correctly!

$ cat .calendar/calendar
2013/02/12 test
^^^^

When doing it right:
$ cat .calendar/calendar
2014/02/12      test
2014/02/13      test1

-A, -B, -t work as described in man-page!

Except:
$ calendar -A 0
Feb 12  test
Feb 13  test1
$ calendar -B 0
Feb 12  test
Feb 13  test1

And segfault on bad input still exists ...

Sorry,
kaltheat
